_note: WHYPE (Wrapped HYPE, HyperEVM chain 999) WETH9 fork. withdraw(uint256 wad) unwraps WHYPE -> native HYPE. Decoded to token::unwrap_native (token.key.address = the WHYPE contract = $to; amount = $args.wad). withdraw is non-payable (value '0'). The WrapNative/UnwrapNative TokenActions now exist (WETH wrap-action work), so unwrapping is structurally legible. WHYPE 0x5555555555555555555555555555555555555555 is 1차-confirmed (HyperLiquid docs 'Wrapped HYPE').
